decision: Keep users/errors.go and users/transactions.go as focused contract files while moving mapping and mutation helpers into models.go and service.go private helpers.
reason: The SRP issue was concentrated in service-level orchestration and repeated projection logic, not in the small contract-only files explicitly allowed to remain unsplit by task notes.
impact: Reduced service.go responsibility overlap without widening API surface or splitting stable contract files.

decision: Keep small contract files focused while extracting SRP hotspots from service.go into model and transaction helpers.
reason: The unchecked scope called out inline profile mapping and transaction branching in service.go, while task notes explicitly allow package-level errors.go and transactions.go to stay as focused contract files unless behavior requires further splitting.
impact: Public/private profile projections and personal-link field assignment now live with the user model; balance adjustment rules now live with transaction constants.
